visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with black hair in a high ponytail and wearing a black top with a neckline cutout is seen in a brightly lit warehouse retail environment. She is putting on a pair of brown Gucci sunglasses, adjusting them with both hands while looking directly into the camera lens with a curious and satisfied facial expression. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up shot of a pink display stand inside a Costco warehouse, showcasing multiple pairs of designer sunglasses with price tags. The central focus is a white label showing the price 7,999 for a pair of Gucci glasses. The background consists of shelves stocked with bulk dietary supplements and pharmaceutical products under bright studio-style overhead lights. (3) A different woman wearing a dark blue Kangol beret and a white sleeveless dress is now trying on a pair of oversized square sunglasses featuring large dangling Gucci logo charms. She adjusts the frames and looks in a side mirror, smiling and gesturing towards the unique charms while turning her head to showcase the profile. (4) The first woman in the black top returns to the frame, wearing her selected sunglasses and posing for a close-up. She smiles broadly, revealing white teeth, and uses her hands to push her hair back and settle the glasses on the bridge of her nose. The surrounding environment remains a busy warehouse aisle with blurred passers-by.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: Gucci 墨鏡低於8折. [Slogan]: 名牌墨鏡大進貨!. (2) [Subtitle]: 哎好好看哦. (3) [Subtitle]: 它跟你的耳環. (4) [Subtitle]: 如果你沒有戴耳環的話. (5) [Subtitle]: 對啊你可以不用戴耳環就戴它. (6) [Variety]: 超漂亮的哎. (7) [Subtitle]: 好市多墨鏡也太中看了吧. (8) [Subtitle]: 真的很好看哎. (9) [Subtitle]: 天啊！這裡有那麼多 Gucci. (10) [Subtitle]: 這個還好 8,000 送我. (11) [Variety]: 8,000 塊的. (12) [Subtitle]: 可是它真的好好看哦. (13) [Subtitle]: 兩個大 Gucci 在這晃. (14) [Subtitle]: 不要買耳環了. (15) [Subtitle]: 這墨鏡加耳環. (16) [Subtitle]: 你耳環也要一萬多. (17) [Subtitle]: 來我先戴上去. (18) [Subtitle]: 哦哦哦哦. (19) [Subtitle]: 有啊 好看嗎. (20) [Subtitle]: 欸..它好像跑到你頭髮裡面了. (21) [Subtitle]: 好像我頭髮不能黑的. (22) [Subtitle]: 好像你頭髮綁，而且你戴的好笨. (23) [Subtitle]: 你幹嘛戴那麼高，小姐你戴那麼高幹嘛. (24) [Subtitle]: 我不要理你，我本來要買給你的. (25) [Subtitle]: 妹妹戴眼鏡的樣子好好看哦. (26) [Subtitle]: 不是不是 沒戴耳環的樣子. (27) [Subtitle]: 這個真的好好看哎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 1 female passerby in the distant background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a black cutout top, another in a white sleeveless dress and a navy blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a large warehouse club (Costco), featuring retail signage for an optical center, hearing aid center, and large shelving units filled with health and beauty products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched digital chime triggers the start, followed by an upbeat mid-tempo lo-fi pop BGM. A female voice speaks with a bright, energetic tone and moderate-to-fast delivery. The background noise contains the low-frequency hum of an air-conditioned indoor space. (2) A soft percussive thud occurs as a pair of glasses is touched. A second female voice enters with high vocal arousal and laughter. The BGM remains constant with a synthesized beat. (3) A metallic click and the rustling of plastic tags are heard clearly in the mix. A male voice speaks off-camera with a teasing, humorous tone. The primary female voices respond with rising intonation and giggling. (4) The track concludes with overlapping dialogue from three people and a final soft percussive impact of an object being moved on a display counter. The BGM fades out abruptly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Teaser -> Product Showcase -> Personal Experience -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and recommend designer Gucci sunglasses at Costco by demonstrating their appearance on the face and highlighting favorable pricing through a casual, friendly shopping vlog format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Frequent display of the Costco logo, close-ups of price tags, and explicit verbal praise for the quality and value of the Gucci branded sunglasses.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media lifestyle vlog that blends retail shopping information with friendly social interaction to increase audience engagement.
